title: Supply Chain Manager - TNT India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - TNT India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TNT India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
